instruction: Summarize the CVE description using precise cybersecurity language.
input: Possible denial of service due to out of memory while processing RRC and NAS OTA message in Snapdragon Auto, Snapdragon Industrial IOT, Snapdragon Mobile
output: The vulnerability is a potential denial of service (DoS) issue caused by an out-of-memory condition when processing RRC (Radio Resource Control) and NAS (Non-Access Stratum) over-the-air messages in Snapdragon Auto, Snapdragon Industrial IoT, and Snapdragon Mobile platforms.
